Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: Terran delivers an ultimatum after he suspects girlfriend Nia of cheating based on her sexually explicit rap lyrics.
Video.title: Eaton vs. Henderson

Video.summary: Two cousins find themselves embroiled in litigation over breach of contract; a couple sue their former roommate for unpaid rent, utility bills, late fees and lost wages.
Video.title: Family Ties, Broken Leases

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Benjamin petitions for a paternity test after his girlfriend, Kenetha, told him during an argument that he is not the father.
Video.title: Brogdon vs. Jenkins

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: Breon issues his girlfriend, Chenika, an ultimatum regarding her refusal to have another baby and grow their family of nine to 10.
Video.title: Holland vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Complaints of excessive weight gain have Georgia couple Tasha and Prez at odds.
Video.title: Mack vs. Tate

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: The Cutlers navigate a messy situationship when Ricardo brings Errollyn to court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Clarke vs. Smith

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Ricky sues his ex-girlfriend, Jada, saying she stole $800 of his child support money to buy tickets to a Beyoncé concert.
Video.title: Colbert vs. Adams

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: Tandrea sues her ex-girlfriend, Chantay, for $1,000 in pet fees that she failed to pay when they moved into an apartment together.
Video.title: Davis vs. Goodman

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: When Queen and Demo are unable to work out their pet issues, the Cutlers help determine how these birds of a feather can stick together.
Video.title: Garrett vs. Williams

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: After a beach getaway raises suspicions, LaBre must convince her husband, Taj, that he is the father of their son.
Video.title: Sewell vs. Sewell

Video.summary: Andre and Niemah battle in court for parental custody of a beloved pet, Bella.
Video.title: Porch vs. Gillis

Video.summary: Jail, bail, and a relationship gone stale. The Wallaces come to Cutlers Court for help.
Video.title: Wallace vs Wallace

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: Yashira seeks to prove that Gregory is the father of her 4-year-old after years of doubt and speculation.
Video.title: Guadalupe vs. Phillips

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges get to the bottom of Chino and Alyssa's relationship issues.
Video.title: Johnson-Smith vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Anita is ready for marriage, but Roman suspects she has been cheating; a polygraph may push him to propose or dispose.
Video.title: Raggs vs. Walker

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: An 11-year age difference and an aborted pregnancy put Illinois couple Shakia and Leontae in a power struggle.
Video.title: Yancy vs. Spaulding

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: Ex-lovers Kaniyah and Bleu feud in court over a stolen pair of limited-edition luxury shoes.
Video.title: Whipple vs. Crawley

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez
